title: capsicum frutescens var. microcarpum
intro: Capsicum frutescens var. microcarpum, also known as the bird's eye chili or Thai bird's eye, is a variety of chili pepper belonging to the Capsicum family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Capsicum frutescens var. microcarpum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include extracts and tinctures, which can be used in various forms, such as capsules, tablets, or topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
